home.title: Chaeyeon Jin
home.subtitle: UX/UI & Graphic Designer
home.description: An independent designer with a passion for creating meaningful digital experiences and visual identities.

about.title: About
about.description: Chaeyeon Jin is an independent UX/UI and graphic designer with an extensive background in digital design and visual communication.
about.description2: Leveraging her network of independent specialists, or collaborating with creative agencies, Chaeyeon combines conceptual creative thinking with her unwavering passion for design, to create bold, original work for brands all over the world.

experienceItems.description: Working on various UX/UI and graphic design projects
Assisted in brand identity and digital design projects

updatesItems.text: New portfolio project featured in Design Magazine

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I'm always open to hearing about creative opportunities, or to just connect with new people.
contact.description2: Either way, please fill in this form and I will get back to you via email as soon as possible.
